name: Hearty Red Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound fully cooked smoked sausage, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans in a Dutch oven or kettle; add water to cover by 2 inches.
2. Bring to a boil; boil for 2 minutes.
3. Remove from the heat; cover and let stand for 1 hour.
4. Drain beans and discard liquid.
5. Add garlic salt, Worcestershire sauce, hot pepper sauce, and water; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
7. Meanwhile, in a skillet, sauté ham and sausage until lightly browned.
8. Remove with a slotted spoon to the bean mixture.
9. Sauté onion, celery, and garlic in drippings until tender; add to the bean mixture.
10. Stir in tomato sauce and bay leaves. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until beans are tender.
11. Discard bay leaves.
12. Measure 2 cups of beans; mash and return to the bean mixture.
13. Stir in parsley, salt, and pepper.
14. Serve over rice. Garnish with parsley if desired.
Yield: 8-10 servings
